summary: Iteration 4 testing complete. Backend: 61/61 tests pass (10 new v4 + 51 regression v1/v2/v3). Frontend: All v4 dashboard features (5 bd-* clickable cards with detail modals + Cüzdanı Aç CTA, monthly-trend Aylık Detay modal, breakdown-card Varlık Detayı modal, this-month-card navigates to /expenses, top-cats 'Bu Ay En Çok Harcanan' visible) and all expenses features (type/range filters, search, scroll bug fix, category chips filter by kind, old seed transactions >60d appear in 'Tüm Zaman') verified working. Login admin/admin works, wrong creds shows 'Kullanıcı adı veya şifre hatalı'.

issues: bd-debt label is 'Kart Borcu' but its detail modal title is 'Kart Borçları' (plural) — minor inconsistency, not blocking

action_items: Optional: Add at least one transfer transaction to seed data so users can visually verify the ⇄ icon/transfer row in Expenses 'Tümü' tab — the rendering code is correct but seed has no transfers.
Optional cosmetic: align bd-debt label ('Kart Borcu') with its detail modal title ('Kart Borçları').
critical_code_review_comments: Expenses uses inline View map inside ScrollView instead of nested FlatList — scroll bug verified fixed (scrollHeight=1839, scrolls top↔bottom freely).
GET /api/transactions correctly supports limit param; results sorted desc by date.
Detail modals use shared 'detail-close' and 'detail-navigate' testIDs (good for testing).
seed_data_creation: Used existing POST /api/seed?force=true (15 txs, incl. 2 older than 60d at 65d & 72d).
context_for_next_testing_agent: v4 features stable. Reusable tests: test_finso_v4.py (limit param + old-tx + v3 regression), test_finso_v3.py (auth/investments/factory-reset), test_finso_v2.py (settings/transfers/cards), test_finso_api.py (core). Auth: admin/admin. To reset auth if changed: backend bootstrap fixture in v4 already tries fallback passwords ('newpass123','changed_pw_v3') and restores admin. Dashboard testIDs: bd-bank/cash/digital/invest/debt → setDetail() opens shared DetailModal with detail-close + detail-navigate buttons. monthly-trend & breakdown-card same pattern. this-month-card and top-cats use router.push('/expenses').
